Experience

Jul 2023 – Present Pune, India

Building and maintaining cloud infrastructure and MLOps pipelines for enterprise clients including Pixar, Hyundai, and L&T. Leading DevOps transformations using Kubernetes, ArgoCD, and Terraform.

Jul 2021 – Jul 2023 Pune, India
